summary: Completed testing of Share Design functionality including z-index fix and SharedDesign page with 4 tabs (Overview, Floor Plan, Elevations, Pricing & Summary). All backend API tests passed (11/11). Frontend SharedDesign page working correctly with all required features.
critical_code_review_comments: Share modal z-index fix confirmed: z-[200] vs Design Summary panel z-[60] - modal will render above floating panels
SharedDesign.jsx properly implements all 4 tabs with required data display
POST /api/share correctly stores email, phone, projectName fields
GET /api/shared/{share_id} returns all stored fields including new fields
seed_data_creation: Test shared design v8a1g0dw already exists with: 3 modules (Studio, Bedroom, Deck), 2 walls, 2 furniture items (Sofa, Dining Table), client Jane Smith, site address 140 Pine Hill Road Dunedin NZ, email jane@example.com, phone 021 123 4567
context_for_next_testing_agent: Share Design functionality fully tested. Test shared design v8a1g0dw available for future testing. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_share_api.py cover POST /api/share and GET /api/shared/{share_id} endpoints.

share_modal_z_index_fix.details: Share modal uses z-[200] class (line 2091 in Configurator.jsx), Design Summary panel uses z-[60] (lines 1705, 1870). Modal will render above all floating panels.

shared_design_overview_tab.details: Shows branded title page with project name, client name, site address, email, phone, areas (internal/deck/total), and pricing estimate

shared_design_floor_plan_tab.details: Renders modules, walls, furniture items (Sofa, Dining Table visible), and dimension annotations (width/depth in metres)

shared_design_pricing_summary_tab.details: Shows full pricing breakdown with site address, email, phone, module breakdown with prices, wall panels breakdown, and building total

shared_design_elevations_tab.details: Renders all 4 building elevations (W-North, Y-South, Z-West, X-East) with zoom controls

post_api_share_endpoint.details: Accepts and stores email, phone, projectName fields along with grid, walls, furniture, client info

get_api_shared_endpoint.details: Returns all stored fields including email, phone, projectName for share_id v8a1g0dw
